overview: An ultra-premium e-commerce showcase with glassmorphism design, animated mesh gradients, bento-grid hero, liquid-shine product cards, and a slide-to-pay checkout slider.
features: Dynamic Island floating navbar with spring animations
Animated mesh gradient background (deep slate, violet, charcoal)
Bento-grid hero with 3D tilt and frosted-glass CTA
Liquid shine product cards with embossed image effect
Glassmorphism throughout with backdrop blur and inner-glow shadows
Fully responsive across mobile, tablet, desktop
